titles.title: 島津製作所 創業150周年記念アニメーション

data.title: Shimazu Seisakusho Sougyou 150-shuunen Kinen Animation
data.title_japanese: 島津製作所 創業150周年記念アニメーション
data.synopsis:
The story takes place in Kyoto in 1877. The atmosphere of the city and people in Kyoto was greatly depressed due to the transfer of the capital to Tokyo. Despite this, Genzo Shimadzu Sr. was busily pursuing his research with the aim of flying a light balloon requested by Kyoto Prefecture. After watching the balloon take off, the protagonist (Shimadzu employee) aspires to connect Genzo's passion from the past to the present and into the future.

(Source: Official YouTube channel)

titles.title: 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring

data.title: Shunkashuutou Daikousha: Haru no Mai
data.title_english: Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring
data.title_japanese: 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
data.synopsis:
Winter was once the only season in the world-but such an existence was too lonely to bear, and so it created Spring to love. Before long, the earth wished for more time to rest in the cycle, and Summer and Autumn were born. The ones who carry the cycle are called the Agents of the Four Seasons. Hinagiku, the Agent of Spring, disappeared from this land ten years ago, taking the season of spring with her. Now, after incredible hardship, she has returned to restore the cycle to its proper state-and, as in the myth passed down since the dawn of time, she sends her love to Winter.

(Source: Yen Press)

titles.title: Tenkaichi: The Greatest Warrior Under the Rising Sun
The Greatest Warrior Under the Rising Sun

data.title: Tenkaichi
title_synonyms: Tenkaichi: The Greatest Warrior Under the Rising Sun
The Greatest Warrior Under the Rising Sun
data.synopsis:
This is not history as we know it. The year is 1600. Ten years have passed since Oda Nobunaga unified the whole of Japan. When Nobunaga realizes he is nearing the end of his life, he announces that he will hand over the reins of power to whoever brings him the strongest warrior. The generals, whose dreams of conquering the country had been crushed, put up their own strongest warriors and aim to become the king of the country!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

data.title: Pan no Akachan
data.synopsis:
One night, bakery owner Riku kneads dough, leaves it to rest, and departs for the day. However, a thief sneaks in and attempts to steal the cash from the register. The ruckus soon wakes the cream bread dough in the fridge. Can the "Baby Bread" save the day?

(Source: Animation World Network)

titles.title: Ai to Aiko: Love Can Happen Anywhere
哀Ai to Ai愛 - Love Can Happen Anywhere

data.title: Ai to Aiko: Love Can Happen Anywhere
data.title_japanese: 哀Ai to Ai愛 - Love Can Happen Anywhere
data.synopsis:
Love Can Happen Anywhere, or originally titled as '哀Ai to Ai愛' is Ai & Aiko's first animation film. Done in stop-motion, it reflects life and how in facing problems that stop us, we should keep moving in small steps for every small move propels change.

(Source: Official Youtube channel)

titles.title: Ai to Aiko no Christmas: Omoide no Tsuri
AiとAikoのクリスマス〜おもいでのツリー〜

data.title: Ai to Aiko no Christmas: Omoide no Tsuri
data.title_japanese: AiとAikoのクリスマス〜おもいでのツリー〜
data.synopsis:
Experience the enchantment of a Christmas journey with Ai and his loyal pup Aiko as they embark on a heartwarming adventure to help their feline friend Genki rediscover the true holiday spirit.

(Source: Gala Film)

titles.title: Steel Ball Run: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken
JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 7: Steel Ball Run
JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken Part 7: Steel Ball Run
スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険
Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

data.title: Steel Ball Run: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken
data.title_english: Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
data.title_japanese: スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険
title_synonyms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 7: Steel Ball Run
JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken Part 7: Steel Ball Run
data.synopsis:
In the American Old West, the world's greatest race is about to begin. Thousands line up in San Diego to travel over six thousand kilometers for a chance to win the grand prize of fifty million dollars. With the era of the horse reaching its end, contestants are allowed to use any kind of vehicle they wish. Competitors will have to endure grueling conditions, traveling up to a hundred kilometers a day through uncharted wastelands. The Steel Ball Run is truly a one-of-a-kind event.

The youthful Johnny Joestar, a crippled former horse racer, has come to San Diego to watch the start of the race. There he encounters Gyro Zeppeli, a racer with two steel balls at his waist instead of a gun. Johnny witnesses Gyro using one of his steel balls to unleash a fantastical power, compelling a man to fire his gun at himself during a duel. In the midst of the action, Johnny happens to touch the steel ball and feels a power surging through his legs, allowing him to stand up for the first time in two years. Vowing to find the secret of the steel balls, Johnny decides to compete in the race, and so begins his bizarre adventure across America on the Steel Ball Run.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: 天幕のジャードゥーガル

data.title: Tenmaku no Jaadugar
data.title_japanese: 天幕のジャードゥーガル
data.synopsis:
In the harem of the Khan, wisdom is beauty. The time: the thirteenth century. The place: Yeke Mongol Ulus, the greatest empire the world has ever known. The woman: Fatima, hailing from Persia, where medical technique and scientific knowledge have been perfected beyond all precedent. Fatima's desire for a stage where she can put her knowledge to work has brought her to the palace of the Mongols, where she falls under the wing of Töregene, the sixth wife of Ögedei, the second Great Khan—a mighty woman with complicated feelings about the direction of the empire. These two women are the axel upon which the politics of the palace, and soon the very world, will turn...

(Source: Yen Press)
data.background: Tenmaku no Jaadugar aired on TV Asahi's IMAnimation block.

data.title: Jigu-ui Juin-eun Goyangi-da
data.synopsis:
Though Chichi the cat looks very cute, she has one goal: eradicate humanity and take over the world! She decides to recruit comrades to aid her in her quest, but it looks like world conquest won't be that easy?! Follow the adventures of Chichi the tyrant, Dunno the doggo who loves humans, and Kaiser Kang Taeshik, the hard-boiled wild hamster, as they face many hardships on their path to absolute dominion!

(Source: Kakao Entertainment Corp., translated)

data.title: Gold Muscle
data.synopsis: A story about a mad scientist named Dr. Carlo Gorgon, who created athletes fused with animal DNA to compete through different sports, and it's up to the human athletes, who were the heroes, to challenge and stop Gorgon's plan.
data.background: The series was never released on home video or distributed after its initial airing.

data.title: Hinagiku no Jinsei
data.synopsis:
Following the emotional journey of a six-year-old girl named Daisy, who loses her mother in a tragic accident and struggles to adapt to life with her aunt. One sleepless night, she encounters a mysterious girl named Dahlia at her window. Their days together begin to transcend time and space, bringing a cosmic perspective to Daisy’s modest life in a downtown yakisoba restaurant.

(Source: Variety)
